title: Run simulation end-to-end with parameter tuning and derived indicators updating
description: Verify a learner can tune mass, damping, and spring constant, start the simulation, and see animation, y(t) plot, and derived indicators update without errors.

steps.description: Click the link to open the simulation tab
Adjust the mass slider to a different value
Adjust the damping slider to a different value
Adjust the spring constant slider to a different value
Verify the simulation animation is running and the y(t) plot is updating
Verify the natural frequency, damping ratio, and damping type indicators are displayed and reflect the current parameters

title: Calculate VM from valid radius and pitch
description: Verify an engineering user can enter valid radius and pitch and receive a VM result.

steps.description: Click the link to open the calculator tab
Verify a VM numeric result is displayed

title: Decrypt ciphertext back to original plaintext (round-trip)
description: Verify a user can encrypt text and then decrypt the produced ciphertext with the same parameters to recover the original plaintext.

steps.description: Click the link to open the crypto tab
Select a valid number of turns
Fill Roundtrip message into the text field
Copy the ciphertext output value into the text field
Verify the decrypted output equals "Roundtrip message"

title: Stop and reset simulation restores defaults and halts updates
description: Verify a learner can reset a running simulation and the system stops and returns parameters and visuals to default state.

steps.description: Click the link to open the simulation tab
Adjust the mass slider to a different value
Verify the simulation is stopped and the animation is not running
Verify parameters are restored to their default values and the y(t) plot is reset

title: Encrypt plaintext to ciphertext with valid parameters
description: Verify a user can enter radius, pitch, turns, and plaintext and receive ciphertext output.

steps.description: Click the link to open the crypto tab
Select a valid number of turns
Fill Hello damped oscillations into the text field

title: App remains responsive when switching tabs during an active simulation
description: Verify an instructor can run the simulation, switch to calculator and crypto actions, then return to simulation without crashes or frozen updates.

steps.description: Click the link to open the simulation tab
Click the link to open the calculator tab
Click the link to open the crypto tab
Select a valid number of turns
Fill Live demo into the text field
Click the link to open the simulation tab
Verify the simulation view remains responsive and continues rendering updates without freezing

title: Recalculating VM updates result and does not keep stale values
description: Verify a user can change radius/pitch and recalculate VM and the displayed result updates accordingly.

steps.description: Click the link to open the calculator tab
Verify the VM result changes after recalculation

title: Cross-feature consistency: VM inputs align between Calculator and Crypto
description: Verify a user can compute VM in the calculator, then use the same radius/pitch in crypto and successfully round-trip encrypt/decrypt.

steps.description: Click the link to open the calculator tab
Click the link to open the crypto tab
Select a valid number of turns
Fill Consistent key test into the text field
Copy the ciphertext output value into the text field
Verify the decrypted output equals "Consistent key test"

title: Repeated start/stop does not break simulation responsiveness
description: Verify an instructor can repeatedly start and stop the simulation without the UI freezing or the animation getting stuck.

steps.description: Click the link to open the simulation tab
Verify the simulation responds to start/stop actions and no runaway animation continues after stopping

title: Crypto validates required text input for encryption
description: Verify the crypto tool prevents encryption when the text field is empty and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Click the link to open the crypto tab
Select a valid number of turns
Verify a required text validation error is visible

title: Calculator validates non-numeric or empty inputs
description: Verify the calculator prevents VM calculation when radius or pitch is missing or not numeric and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Click the link to open the calculator tab
Fill abc into the radius field
Verify a numeric input validation error is visible

title: Changing sliders during a running simulation keeps plots stable
description: Verify a user can adjust simulation parameters while the simulation runs and the UI continues updating without displaying invalid values.

steps.description: Click the link to open the simulation tab
Adjust the damping slider while the simulation is running
Adjust the spring constant slider while the simulation is running
Verify the y(t) plot continues updating without blanking or showing invalid values
Verify the derived indicators remain visible and update after the parameter changes

title: Simulation handles boundary numeric inputs without crashing
description: Verify the simulation UI remains stable when parameters are set to extreme allowed values and the simulation is started.

steps.description: Click the link to open the simulation tab
Move the mass slider to its minimum allowed value
Move the damping slider to its maximum allowed value
Move the spring constant slider to its maximum allowed value
Verify the simulation view remains responsive and continues rendering without crashing
Verify the indicators and y(t) plot area remain populated rather than disappearing
